title: Disposable fields should be disposed
messageFormat: Dispose the field '{0}' in this type's Dispose method; it owns a disposable resource that is never released.
summary: A type that holds a field of a disposable type owns that resource for its lifetime. If the owning type implements IDisposable but its Dispose method never disposes the field, the wrapped resource leaks every time an instance is discarded.
Release each owned disposable field inside Dispose. If ownership is intentionally transferred elsewhere, make that transfer explicit so the field is not treated as owned here.
